body.visualDesc: Medium shot at the Big Oak's base. Bo drums her wings rapidly on the golden straw nest like a drum-roll, grinning mischievously. Pip points excitedly at the egg. Mo stands beside the great trunk of the Big Oak, amused. CRITICAL: the pale-cream eggshell is CLOSED and intact except for exactly TWO thin hairline cracks; a soft warm glow shines through the cracks only - the egg is NOT split, NOT open, NOT hatching yet. Dappled afternoon light through oak leaves.
